import React from'react';import{Navigate}from'react-router-dom';import{useAuth}from'../contexts/AuthContext';/**
 * ProtectedRoute Component
 * Redirects to login if user is not authenticated
 * Shows loading state while auth is initializing
 */import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const ProtectedRoute=_ref=>{let children=_ref.children;const _useAuth=useAuth(),isAuthenticated=_useAuth.isAuthenticated,loading=_useAuth.loading;if(loading){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{display:'flex',justifyContent:'center',alignItems:'center',height:'100vh',fontSize:'16px',color:'var(--text2)'},children:"Loading..."});}if(!isAuthenticated){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Navigate,{to:"/login",replace:true});}return children;};export default ProtectedRoute;
